summary: Phase 2 の単発 simulation / sweep / heatmap CLI で KEY=VALUE 指定を第一表記として使えるようにし，README と運用メモを更新した。

tests_reviewed.command: uv run python scripts/01_simulate_swimming/run_sweep.py config=conf/phase2_sweeps/hook_overstretch.yaml mode=first-second-grid time.duration_s=0.001 motor.torque_Nm=0 first_second_spring_scales=1 output_dir=/private/tmp/phase2_cli_override_smoke dry_run=true sample_limit=1

uv run ruff format --check scripts/01_simulate_swimming/01_simulate_swimming.py scripts/01_simulate_swimming/run_sweep.py scripts/01_simulate_swimming/plot_heatmap.py src/sim_swim/analysis/cli_profiles.py tests/test_phase2_sweep_profiles.py tests/test_e2e_cli.py

uv run ruff check scripts/01_simulate_swimming/01_simulate_swimming.py scripts/01_simulate_swimming/run_sweep.py scripts/01_simulate_swimming/plot_heatmap.py src/sim_swim/analysis/cli_profiles.py tests/test_phase2_sweep_profiles.py tests/test_e2e_cli.py

adr_reason: CLI指定形式と互換aliasの整理であり，物理モデル，数値解釈，下流MLデータ生成方針を変える意思決定ではないため。
